differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic toxicity (drug-induced pyrexia and hepatitis)
Anaplasmosis (due to residency in New England and clinical presentation)
Acute cholecystitis with secondary systemic inflammatory response
Occult metastatic melanoma progression with paraneoplastic symptoms
next_steps: Perform PCR for Anaplasma phagocytophilum and Ehrlichia chaffeensis
Perform liver biopsy with histopathological assessment for drug toxicity vs. infiltration
Serum ferritin, triglycerides, and fibrinogen levels to rule out HLH
Repeat abdominal imaging (MRCP or HIDA scan) to further evaluate biliary pathology
Initiate systemic corticosteroids if liver enzymes continue to trend upward or if biopsy confirms drug-induced hepatotoxicity
